title: Remove SessionStart revision_hash gate + rename narrow→entries + delete gate tests + rewrite cross-client-visibility doc
description: Remove the revision_hash gate logic from knowledge-hint-broad.cjs (the SessionStart cooldown-sidecar mechanism that suppresses re-emission of the broad menu on unchanged knowledge graph). Rename the misleading local variable `narrow` → `entries` in renderSummary. Delete all gate-related test cases (three describe blocks). Rewrite three blocks in docs/cross-client-visibility.md that currently advertise the gate as a feature.

files.target: gate logic + module.exports + local variable rename
files.change: Delete SESSIONSTART_HASH_CACHE_FILE constant (~L86), readSessionStartLastHash function (~L112-L121), writeSessionStartLastHash function (~L129-L138), bodySuppressed branch in main() (~L534-L571), gate comments (~L60-L83). Drop the two helper exports from module.exports. Replace `const lines = bodySuppressed ? [] : renderSummary(payload)` with unconditional `const lines = renderSummary(payload)`. Rename local variable `narrow` → `entries` in renderSummary (~L491) with inline comment explaining the rename ('payload.narrow in --all mode degenerates to the full shared index — rebound to entries to avoid name confusion. CLI protocol field name is unchanged; a wire-shape rename is a deferred independent task.'). Add a short comment somewhere in the file noting that prior versions wrote .fabric/.cache/sessionstart-last-hash but it is now orphaned harmless dead state.

Update HookModule type signature (~L46-L77) to drop readSessionStartLastHash, writeSessionStartLastHash, SESSIONSTART_HASH_CACHE_FILE fields. Delete three dedicated describe blocks: readSessionStartLastHash (~L381-L415, 3 tests), writeSessionStartLastHash (~L417-L453, 4 tests), main revision_hash gating (~L455-L544, 5 tests). Delete additional gate-bypass-for-banner regression cases under 'rc.8 — broad gate body+banner interactions' (~L908-L984, 5 tests). Approximately 17+ test cases removed total.

Rewrite three blocks that currently advertise the T8 revision_hash gate as a feature. Replace with text explaining that the broad menu is unconditionally emitted at every SessionStart fire (matching Skill-style progressive disclosure) and that compact/clear-triggered SessionStart re-fires re-inject the menu intentionally. Drop the 'Gotchas — banner-blindness mitigation' bullet at L47-L55. Drop the 'sessionstart-last-hash' entry in the cooldown-sidecar enumeration at L50. Remove the T8-gate verification checkboxes at L122-L128 (only the 'cold start' checkbox survives); replace with checks that verify menu re-injection on compact/clear.

implementation: Read knowledge-hint-broad.cjs to confirm exact line numbers for SESSIONSTART_HASH_CACHE_FILE constant, the two helper functions, the bodySuppressed branch, and module.exports test seam — then delete them surgically (do not touch unrelated logic in main())
Replace `const lines = bodySuppressed ? [] : renderSummary(payload)` with the unconditional form; verify no other reference to bodySuppressed remains

Inside renderSummary, rename the parameter destructure and local variable from `narrow` to `entries`, add the explanatory inline comment, and verify all references inside the function body are renamed

Add a one-line code comment near the top of the file (or near where the const used to live) explaining: '// Prior versions wrote .fabric/.cache/sessionstart-last-hash as a revision_hash cooldown sidecar (rc.5-rc.11). The gate was removed in rc.12; orphaned sidecars are harmless dead state and are intentionally not cleaned up (zero-user clean-slate).'
Update knowledge-hint-broad.test.ts HookModule type, then delete the three gate describe blocks and the rc.8 banner-interaction regression block — ensure remaining tests still compile and pass
Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test knowledge-hint-broad` and confirm no test file references readSessionStartLastHash/writeSessionStartLastHash/SESSIONSTART_HASH_CACHE_FILE
Rewrite the three blocks in docs/cross-client-visibility.md per the change spec; preserve surrounding doc structure

reference.pattern: Hook-level test-seam pattern: knowledge-hint-broad.cjs exports a CONSTANTS bag + helper functions via module.exports for the .test.ts file to load via createRequire. Removing exports requires synchronous deletion of the matching HookModule type fields in the test file.
reference.examples: Mirror the rc.11 reverse-pattern: when the gate was added, the same three files (hook + test + doc) all changed in lockstep. The removal follows the same lockstep.

criteria: knowledge-hint-broad.cjs no longer contains the strings 'SESSIONSTART_HASH_CACHE_FILE', 'readSessionStartLastHash', 'writeSessionStartLastHash', 'bodySuppressed' (verify via grep)
knowledge-hint-broad.test.ts has zero references to the three deleted symbols (verify via grep)
renderSummary uses local variable `entries` (not `narrow`); inline comment about the rename is present
All remaining tests in knowledge-hint-broad.test.ts pass (`pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test knowledge-hint-broad` exit 0)
docs/cross-client-visibility.md no longer mentions 'T8 gate', 'sessionstart-last-hash' (in cooldown context), or 'banner-blindness mitigation'
A code comment in knowledge-hint-broad.cjs documents that the orphan sidecar is intentionally not cleaned

rationale.chosen_approach: Surgical deletion of gate-only logic; preserve all non-gate hook behavior (banner emission, narrow-hint rendering, payload parsing) untouched. Test deletions are precisely scoped to the three gate-specific describe blocks plus the rc.8 banner-interaction regression block.
alternatives_considered: Feature-flag the gate behind a config option (rejected: zero-user clean-slate; no need for opt-in legacy behavior)
Keep helpers as no-ops for one release for backward shim (rejected: clean-slate)
Bulk-delete the test file and regenerate (rejected: non-gate tests must survive)
decision_factors: Three-file locality — hook + test + doc are all that need to change
Test seam contract — module.exports drives HookModule type
Zero downstream consumers outside the trio (gate is self-contained)
rationale.tradeoffs: Orphan sidecar files persist on existing dogfood repos; mitigated by inline comment explaining the intentional non-cleanup.

manual_checks: Trigger SessionStart twice in a row with unchanged .fabric/knowledge/ — verify menu emits both times (was: silent on second)
Trigger compact-then-resume or clear-then-resume — verify menu re-injects
Confirm .fabric/.cache/sessionstart-last-hash on this dogfood repo is untouched (still present as orphan)
success_metrics: Zero references to gate symbols in source/tests (grep exit 1)
knowledge-hint-broad test suite passes with reduced test count (17+ fewer tests)
cross-client-visibility.md reads coherently with gate removed
unit: renderSummary still produces correct output with `entries` rename (existing assertions cover this — no new test needed)
integration: Existing SessionStart end-to-end fixture tests continue passing
